# OpenClaw Workshop: From Personal Automation to Business Workflows

[Build Stuffs](https://luma.com/calendar/cal-2ON7CXquAjeg3Db)

Jul

8

Wednesday, July 8

4:00 PM - 6:00 PM GMT+7

[Ho Chi Minh City\\
\\
Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Ho%20Chi%20Minh%20City&query_place_id=ChIJ0T2NLikpdTERKxE8d61aX_E)

Approval Required

Your registration is subject to host approval.

Welcome! To join the event, please register below.

Request to Join

You will be asked to verify token ownership with your wallet.

About Event

 **AI agents are everywhere.**

The challenge is no longer running them.

The challenge is making them useful for your business workflows.

Join us for a practical workshop on how teams, startups, and enterprises are using OpenClaw to automate workflows, improve productivity, and create business value.

As part of the Agentic AI Build Week workshops by GenAI Fund.

## Hosts

 **Goon Nguyen**

- Creator of [GoClaw.sh](https://goclaw.sh/?utm_source=luma) & [ClaudeKit.cc](https://claudekit.cc/?utm_source=luma)

- Admin of Build In Public Vietnam

- **CTO of TOP Group**

 **Ky-Nam**

- Founder & CEO of [Flowser.ai](https://flowser.ai/?utm_source=luma)

- Host at Build Stuffs Saigon

* * *

## What You'll Learn and Get

🎁 100+ OpenClaw VPS instances giveaway from Flowser

🏢 **Enterprise Systems — Goon Nguyen**

- Enterprise AI workflows and automation systems

- Security, governance, and data privacy

- Production deployment patterns

- AI adoption considerations for organizations

📣 **Growth & Business Workflows — Ky-Nam**

- Content creation and audience growth

- GTM and outbound automation

- Customer engagement workflows

- Team productivity and operational workflows

- Advanced OpenClaw workflow patterns

- Evals and self-improving systems

* * *

## Who Should Attend?

👷 Tech Builders & Founders

🏢 Business owners and operators

📈 Marketing and growth teams

🤝 Sales and GTM leaders

💼 Consultants and agency owners

👨‍💻 Product and technology leaders

* * *

## Why Attend?

Learn where AI agents create real business value

See practical workflows that teams are using today

Understand how organizations are deploying agent systems safely

Meet other founders, operators, and AI practitioners

Get ideas you can bring back to your team immediately

* * *

If you're asking...

"How can AI agents help my business?"

"How do we move beyond ChatGPT and prompts?"

"Where should my team start?"

This workshop is for you.

**Build Stuffs**

About [https://buildstuffs.com](https://buildstuffs.com/?utm_source=luma) \- We are a network of young people building tech-related projects across the world. We host regular cowork sessions and online communities to push each other forward and keep each other accountable.

Join Build Stuffs Saigon group chat here: [https://chat.whatsapp.com/IGxIAMSP9X6KkELPNJnuaf](https://chat.whatsapp.com/IGxIAMSP9X6KkELPNJnuaf?utm_source=luma)
